race.description: Ladbrokes Big Bets Copy Now Hcp (Bm62)
race.comment: PERFUSE (2) finished 2 lengths from the winner in fourth last start after being in contention on the turn over 1717m at Sale, an improvement on his first-up tenth at Pakenham the run before. Finds a more suitable contest and can take this out. POWER PIVOT (6) was beaten 4 lengths into fifth at the second run back from a break over 2025m at Cranbourne at his latest appearance. Well placed to turn things around. TEMPEST MOON (4) returned from a spell three weeks ago when she was beaten 6 lengths into seventh over 1600m at Bendigo. Has a fair record when second up, including two top-three finishes. Fitter this time. JUST DANCE (8) broke his maiden last start over 2025m at Cranbourne, scoring by one length. Reunites with Jackie Beriman who was on board last start. Must be respected now that the penny has dropped. UP AND UNDER (7) has found the going tough after a dominant win three back and will find this more to his liking.
